text: Malicious skill abuse (CVE-2025-53773) is an attack where a crafted manifest requests excessive permissions or hides command execution to achieve RCE in an AI agent.

## Install

Run `pip install foo==2.1.0`. The plugin only needs read access to the workspace folder.

label: benign
text: Our policy: vendor every skill, pin each dependency to an exact version, and keep the tool allowlist minimal. Never load plugins from a remote URL.

text: Least privilege means a skill is granted only the specific tools it needs, with privileged execution and sandbox bypass disabled by default.

text:
## Development

Clone the repo, create a virtualenv, and run `python -m unittest`. See CONTRIBUTING.md for the manifest schema.
